creative_brief.villains: Always portray the opposing empire/antagonist force as EXTREMELY STRONG — overwhelming numbers, elite reputation, top-tier equipment and leadership. The protagonists' achievement should feel impossible, not easy. (e.g. Thermopylae episode framed Persia as 'an empire of a million men' with the undefeated 'Immortals'.) Apply this villain-strength standard to every future episode's antagonist faction.
